name: shop-ledger
description: Shop Ledger — finance app for a Pani Puri & Chaat shop. Production-ready client + server.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,cyan "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.lint: concurrently "npm --prefix server run lint" "npm --prefix client run lint"
